intent: In-game smoke-test gate for Phase 5 (HighShadows + HdrSkybox). Full checklist: docs/smoke-test-phase5.md

steps.intent: HighShadows=false and HdrSkybox=false. Capture with `wsm3d screenshot phase 5 -Name before` (see docs/smoke-test-phase5.md).
HighShadows=true and HdrSkybox=true, same scene and camera. Capture with `wsm3d screenshot phase 5 -Name after` (docs/smoke-test-phase5.md).
Shadow contact and sky closeup. Capture with `wsm3d screenshot phase 5 -Name shadows-sky` (docs/smoke-test-phase5.md).
